props.name: name
props.description: - Manages a selected values array and synchronizes state down to child checkboxes. - Relays form-related events (mount, set value, set/reset error, reset fields) to and from children. Approach - Children register themselves via a FormFieldMount event; we track them in _childRecords. - All value and error changes flow through a small relay bus (receive/relay helpers). - Support both slotted goa-checkbox elements and direct child component instances. / import { onMount, tick } from "svelte"; import type { Spacing } from "../../common/styling"; import { calculateMargin } from "../../common/styling"; import { receive, relay, toBoolean } from "../../common/utils"; import { FieldsetSetValueMsg, FieldsetSetValueRelayDetail, FieldsetSetErrorMsg, FieldsetResetErrorsMsg, FormFieldMountRelayDetail, FormFieldMountMsg, FieldsetResetFieldsMsg, FieldsetErrorRelayDetail, } from "../../types/relay-types"; /** The name for the checkbox list group. Used for form submission.

props.name: value
props.description: Array of currently selected checkbox values.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all checkboxes in the list.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state on all checkboxes in the list.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the checkbox list container.
